title: AP Power Sector – Assistant Executive Engineer – 629 Posts
shortInfo: AP Power Sector Recruitment 2026 short notice released for Assistant Executive Engineer. Apply online at the official AP Power Sector careers portal.

basic_details.job_title: AP Power Sector AEE Recruitment 2026 (Short Notice) - Apply Online for 629 Assistant Executive Engineer Posts
basic_details.short_information: AP Power Sector Recruitment 2026 short notice released for Assistant Executive Engineer. Apply online at the official AP Power Sector careers portal.
basic_details.organization_name: Andhra Pradesh Energy Department / AP Power Utilities

qualification.education_qualification: B.E / B.Tech in Electrical / Civil / Telecom Engineering

how_to_apply: Visit the official AP Power Utility / recruitment website once the notification is released
Read the detailed Assistant Executive Engineer notification carefully
Select the relevant utility and discipline
Register with valid email ID and mobile number
Fill in the online application form with correct academic and personal details
Upload required documents, photograph, and signature
Pay the application fee, if applicable
Submit the form and take a printout for future reference
